(SC) About opening a new account title.
Government of Maharashtra
the Housing Department
Government Decision No: PRYO-2026 / Q.No.16 / HUF-2
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: May 27, 2026.
Read: - 1. Government Decision, Housing Department, No.PRO-2015 / No.110 / HUF-2 (Cell),
December 9, 2015.
2. Letter from the Office of the Accountant General (Accounts and Entitlements) - Maharashtra, Mumbai No.
No: BV / CH-5 / Housing Department / UOR - 30/2026-27 286,
Preamble: Implementation of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY) in the state from December 2015
is being done. Funds under the scheme will henceforth be disbursed on the SNA-SPARSH system.
Therefore, the government was considering taking up a new unit-wise head of accounts under the scheme.
The Government's Decisions:
Scheduled Castes (59) under the Centrally Sponsored Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
Component) to create a new head of accounts for the central account for this component as follows:
The decision is being approved by the Government: -
1) SLS Code: BLC-MH712
State Linked Scheme-wise Component (SLS) - MH712 PMAY URBAN BLC
